text.source_text: गतिशब्दाभ्यां तथा हि दृष्टं लिङ्गं च ॥ १५ ॥
text.transliteration_iast: gatiśabdābhyāṃ tathā hi dṛṣṭaṃ liṅgaṃ ca || 15 ||

translation.literal_translation: By the words of movement; so indeed seen, and also by indication. (15)
translation.technical_translation: Sutra 1.3.15: movement-statements plus supporting linga establish the dahara referent as Brahman.
translation.interpretive_note: Sutra summary of gati + linga evidence.

lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Tracks each block inside the section-level inferential sequence

uncertainty_notes: Curated in contiguous S03 pass with stable section-04 style criteria.
A later philological pass may refine compound parsing and samasa-level nuance in long bhashya segments.
